archetype: Archetype 2: Performance Pro (Esports & Tactical Gaming Variant)
vibe: Rocket League-inspired, high-octane neon, futuristic esports broadcast graphics, kinetic energy. Absolutely no AI-slop purple/violet gradients. Focus on solid bold dark gym/arena backgrounds with sharp accents.

headings.usage: Use for all Hero headings, HUD overlays, scoreboard text, and loading screen Rules.

body.usage: Use for player explanations, question text, and standard UI text. Maintains technical feel while remaining readable.

monospace.usage: Use for timestamps in the YouTube player, stat readouts, and score numbers.

primary.name: Boost Orange
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, active states, user score highlights.

secondary.name: Volt Blue
secondary.usage: Timeline scrubbers, secondary buttons, HUD borders.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. p-6 to p-8 inside cards, gap-6 to gap-8 for grids.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Use Mode B 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard. Tight gaps, highly utilized space. For marketing, use overlapping elements.
layout_and_spacing.hud_style: Question modals and player UI should feel like an in-game HUD. Use sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm), clip-paths for angled cuts (e.g., [clip-path:polygon(10px_0,100%_0,100%_calc(100%-10px),calc(100%-10px)_100%,0_100%,0_10px)]).

components.buttons: Sharp corners, heavy font weight. Use 'Boost Orange' or 'Volt Blue' with glowing hover effects (e.g., hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,107,0,0.5)]). Ensure text color is explicit on hover.
components.cards: Dark backgrounds (#111111), 1px solid borders (border-white/10). No soft shadows, use 1px solid strokes or 2px 'Inner Glow' highlights.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults customized with sharp borders, dark backgrounds, and 'Volt Blue' focus rings.
components.modals: HUD overlays for the quiz player. backdrop-blur-md, bg-black/80, 1px bright border. Must lock progress. Do not use generic white cards.
components.loading_screen: MUST feature community 'Rules' (e.g., 'Rule #1: Always go for kickoff', 'Rule #0: Never break a front-to-front lock'). Large 'Rajdhani' font, centered, with a pulsing 'Boost Orange' loading bar underneath.

animations.transitions: Snappy, mechanical transitions. 0.15s ease-out for hovers.
animations.loading: High-octane pulse or rotating octane-themed spinner.
animations.question_appear: HUD slide-in from side or bottom, fast with a slight 'glitch' or bounce effect to simulate game UI.

hero_background.description: Close-up of a neon-lit sports car, serving as the Rocket League inspired hero background. Must have a heavy bg-black/60 overlay.

dashboard_empty_state.description: Illuminated gaming controller with blue lights on a dark background.
dashboard_empty_state.usage: Empty state for player dashboard when no quizzes are active.

creator_background.description: High-tech gaming setup with neon lights.
creator_background.usage: Background/accent image for the Creator Quiz Builder landing or auth page.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark theme. Do not use any generic SaaS white/gray layouts.
For the Headings, you MUST install and use the 'Rajdhani' font from Google Fonts.

The Loading screen is a core feature. It must randomly select a Rocket League 'Rule' (e.g., 'Rule #1: Always go for kickoff', 'Rule #0: Never break a front-to-front lock') to display while fetching videos/quizzes.
Quiz UI must overlay the YouTube player directly, functioning like an in-game HUD (glassy, sharp edges, neon borders).
Install @phosphor-icons/react for bold, athletic-looking icons (use Duotone or Fill weights for high impact).
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g., data-testid='submit-answer-button').
Do NOT use pure #000000 for everything; use #050505 for base and #111111 for surfaces to provide depth.
Ensure contrast ratios are strictly adhered to. When placing text over hero images, use heavy overlays (bg-black/60) or text-shadows.
Avoid standard Shadcn borders on cards; instead, use 'Tactical Minimalism' with 1px borders and glowing hover states.
Do NOT use any purple, violet, or teal (#1B93A4) gradients as they are forbidden. Stick to Boost Orange (#FF6B00) and Volt Blue (#007AFF).
